DialogueStarters: Hello {LISTENER}! How has your day been?|Good to see you {LISTENER}. What brings you here?|{LISTENER}! I was just thinking about you.

Description: Members discussing faction affairs and politics
DialogueStarters: Have you heard what {FACTION_LEADER} is planning?|The council meeting yesterday was interesting...|I wonder how long this alliance will last.

Description: Business discussions between merchants and traders
DialogueStarters: I have some items that might interest you...|The market has been unpredictable lately.|What are you willing to trade for this?

Description: Discussing survival tactics and threats in the wasteland
DialogueStarters: The rad storms have been getting worse...|I heard there's a new pack of ferals near the old factory.|We need to find a safer route to the trading post.
You look lovely today {LISTENER}.|I've been hoping to spend more time with you.|Would you like to walk with me tonight?

Description: Tense conversation between enemies or rivals
DialogueStarters: I haven't forgotten what you did...|You're not welcome here {LISTENER}.|This isn't over between us.

Description: Intellectual discussion about lore and history
DialogueStarters: I found an interesting piece of old tech...|The archives mention something about this area...|Have you ever wondered about the old world?

Description: Strategic discussions between soldiers and commanders
DialogueStarters: The patrol reports movement in sector 7...|We need to adjust our defensive positions.|Intelligence suggests enemy activity nearby.

Description: Health-related conversations between medic and patient
DialogueStarters: How are you feeling after the treatment?|I'm concerned about that wound...|You need to take better care of yourself.

Description: Spiritual conversations about faith and beliefs
DialogueStarters: The spirits have been restless lately...|Do you ever wonder about our purpose?|Faith can be our greatest strength.

Description: Excited discussions about technology and gadgets
DialogueStarters: Look at this fascinating piece of tech!|I've been working on a new modification...|The engineering on this is incredible!
I don't think we're getting the whole truth...|Someone is pulling the strings behind this...|Keep your voice down, they might be listening.

Description: Wolves communicating through howls and body language
DialogueStarters: *Howls to establish territory*|*Low growl indicating submission*|*Excited yips about successful hunt*
*Marks territory with scent*|*Chattering to ward off intruders*|*Soft barks to communicate with mate*

Description: AIs sharing information through digital protocols
DialogueStarters: Initiating secure data transfer...|System status: Nominal. Requesting update.|Network integrity at 97.3%. Proceed with caution.

Description: Corrupted beings communicating through broken speech
DialogueStarters: *Garbled speech* ...hungry... need...|*Distorted voice* Remember... before...|*Incomprehensible muttering* Pain... always pain...
You better watch yourself around here...|This is our turf now, got it?|Hand over your caps or things get messy.
We must preserve this knowledge for future generations.|The old texts speak of technologies we've lost...|Education is our greatest weapon against barbarism.
